The American occupation preferred to ignore Jeju, rather than to give reason to the committees; that pointed out a formal continental leadership, but let the people of the island manage their own affairs.” [2]
The manoeuvres of the South Korean reactionaries and the American imperialists to set up a separate country, by carrying out far-reaching elections, triggered a deep hatred in the population of Jeju, which led an armed struggle against US imperialism and its puppets. Largely run by the South Korean Labour Party, the island's masses launched armed confrontations, set fire to voting centers and police stations. The working class carried out important strikes, which drew attention for their radicality.
To suppress the demonstrations of the Jeju population, the American imperialists recruited for dirty work the “services” of the so-called “North Youth League”, paramilitary organization of fascist type, formed in its great measure by reactionary elements that escaped from North Korea. The North Youth League was known for its cruelty to the population. So the historian George Katsiaficas said: “These unpaid murderers lived from the looting of war, raping and murdering from village to village, subjecting the island’s native defenses – particularly women – to torture and humiliation.” [3]
The People's Levant of Jeju was one of the first major revolts of the South Korean people against the oppression of US imperialism and South Korean reactionaries. The People's Levant of Jeju was drowned in a sea of blood, leaving between 30,000 and 60,000 dead, with about 40,000 people seeking exile in Japan. At this time table, there are other important uprisings that can also be remembered, such as the Yo Su Levant. In the port city of Yo Su, a contingent of troops waiting to repress the people of Jeju refused to serve as a cannon bush in the massacre of their countrymen, and rebel against the government, passing to the armed struggle. As we can see, the South Korean people, from the beginning, resisted bravely against the machinations of American imperialism. Only after several repressive campaigns and a real massacre against the population, the Republic of Korea – puppet state until the present time in the southern part of the peninsula – could be founded. During the Korean War, numerous massacres would also be committed by the puppet regime in collusion with US imperialism, so that we could write dozens of articles about each of them.

The first stage of the Republic of Korea was commanded by Syngman Rhee. After the fraudulent elections held on May 10, 1948, Syngman Rhee would rule South Korea from this year to 1960. During the time he was in power, Syngman Rhee headed the country with an iron hand, chasing thousands of patriots who fought against the domination of American imperialism. One of the most emblematic cases of political repression against pro-reunification leadership was the arrest (1956) and execution (1959) of Cho Pong Am, who had been a candidate for the presidency of South Korea by the Progressive Party and received two million votes in the elections held in 1956. Cho Pong Am, like most political opponents to the Marionete regime, would be accused of “Spy of North Korea”.
From the economic point of view, the country was also placed under full dominion and dependence on the US financial “auxiliary” which in 1953 represented 14% of the country’s Gross National Product, and which in 1957 would reach approximately 23%. A significant part of this amount stood in the pockets of a new class of bureaucratic capitalists that formed, as well as the correligionaries of Syngman Rhee and his flock. Corruption reached gigantic levels and contributed to increasing popular dissatisfaction against the regime, which never enjoyed real legitimacy among the popular masses. On March 11, 1960, Masan's population goes to the streets to protest the fraudulent elections held by Syngman Rhee. On March 15, 1960, such protests spread to other cities in South Korea and are violently repressed. The repression against the movement only caused the mass rebellion to increase in adherence. In Seoul, protesters surrounded and set fire to government buildings, the Liberal Party (which was in the government) and the Anti-Communist Youth Association of the Republic of Korea. Although the demonstrations initially directed against the Syngman Rhee government, there was a strong anti-imperialist feeling behind the student's motivations. The U.S. State Department, hypocritically, was aware of having the country’s image linked to the government of Syngman Rhee, published a note requiring the South Korean government to take “necessary and effective actions to protect the democratic right of expression, assembly and freedom of the press,” as well as having “criticized” the government’s repressive measures.
Using a tactic that would be repeated in other episodes – such as in the People's Levant of Gwangju of 1980 –, the United States sought to pass to the South Korean people and international public opinion an image of "distancing" in relation to the Syngman Rhee government, as if the current reactionary regime in South Korea was not itself a Yankee creation. As noted by an editorial of the People’s Diary, published on April 25, 1960, “without the North American bayonets, the Syngman Rhee regime would not have lasted a day at all.” Syngman Rhee eventually resigned, ending his unfortunate U.S. lacquering trajectory in an exile in Hawaii.

After the fall of Syngman Rhee, South Korea lived a very short period of bourgeois “democracy”. The administration of the puppet state passed into the hands of more liberal sectors of the South Korean ruling classes, the state was reorganized into parliamentary bases and Chang Myon was elected Prime Minister of the country. On 16 May 1961, Chang Myon was the victim of a coup d'état led by reactionary Pak Chung Hee. The coup inaugurates a new phase in South Korea's political life, which would also be marked by the brutal exploitation of the workers and repression of the mass movements, especially those of a revolutionary character. Pak Chung Hee establishes a military dictatorship of fascist type.
Pak Chung Hee was a former Japanese collaborator. During his youth, he joined the Imperial Japanese Army and studied at the Tokyo Military Academy. His Japanese name was Okamoto Minoru. Still at the beginning of his government, he installed a so-called “revolutionary court” which was in charge of arresting and executing some names from the previous period. The coup d'état perpetrated by Pak Chung Hee sought to present itself to the masses as the real culmination of the spirit of the April 1960 revolts that overthrew Syngman Rhee. In the beginning, he adopted a hostile stance to the so-called chaebols, South Korean state conglomerates that had begun to thrive still time of Syngman Rhee, thanks to his policy of “import substitution”. Chaebols were seen by South Korean public opinion as sources of corruption. Pak Chung Hee, along with his political collaborator Kim Jong Pil, would create KCIA, an anti-communist espionage agency, which would be known for international kidnappings of South Korean teachers and students living abroad. Promotes an open hostility policy against the socialist countries. The American imperialists assessed that under Pak Chung Hee, Korea would be advancing correctly.
With the Vietnam War, the United States' ability to finance the South Korean economy is weakened (at the time 80% of fixed capital investments came from the United States). Thus, Par Chung Hee proposed, with Yankee support, the normalization of relations and a greater approximation with Japanese imperialism. In March 1964, in front of the negotiations between Japan and South Korea, the South Korean popular masses again stand up, openly shouting “Death to Japanese imperialism!”.
In June 1964, the reactionary government declared martial law and the United States Combined Forces Command authorized the displacement of two combat divisions to suppress the protests. At the same time, the puppet government approves the sending of South Korean soldiers to fight alongside the Yankee invaders in the Vietnam War. Chun Doo Hwan, who would become a central figure in the suppression of the Popular Levant of Gwangju, served as commander of a division of the South Korean puppet army in Vietnam. Participation in the Vietnam conflict was also an opportunity for South Korean reactionaries to profit from the sufferings and massacres of the Vietnamese people. South Korean companies of supply transport, civil construction and entertainment obtained gigantic profits during this period.
To deepen its reactionary domination under the puppet political regime of South Korea, Pak Chung-hee promotes in October 1972 an auto coup, dissolving the National Assembly and drafting a new constitution, which would be known as the Yushin Constitution. The constitution of Yushin represents an even greater closure of a regime that was already brutally dictatorial and fascist. The “new era”, strongly inspired by the Meiji Restoration period in Japan, would raise the levels of exploitation of the South Korean working class at alarming levels.
At the time when he served the Imperial Japanese army, Pak Chung Hee received much ideological influence that would form his worldview for a model of social organization strongly based on hierarchy, strong state control, nationalism and anti-communism. From that time on, the Chaebols begin to despont as the vertebral column of the South Korean economy, which ensured that the most significant sector of the South Korean capitalists decisively supported the regime.
Against the intensification of capitalist exploitation, the workers were seeking ways to organize themselves and fight for their rights. Reporting the extenuating working days to which they were submitted – officially labor law provided 8 hours of workday, something almost never respected –, the workers began sending letters to the most diverse government agencies. Their demands were met with contempt or pure and simple repression. In 1970 – two years before the dictatorial regime of Yushin – Chun Tae Il, a young worker activist, would commit suicide by firing his own body, aiming to draw attention to the problem of the violation of labor rights in South Korea. KCIA exercised a strict control against trade union activity in the country, allowing only the functioning of the trade union center aligned with the regime.
In 1974, the government announced that it had defeated an alleged joint conspiracy with North Korea for the overthrow of the government, organized by a fictional “People’s Revolutionary Party”. Following this episode, thousands of people were arrested and tortured by the regime. The government organized a pharass trial of eight leaders, who allegedly belonged to this group, and would later be executed in 1975. It would later prove that this episode was a farce set up by the reactionary regime.
The number of protests and revolts against the government grew as it was taking more reactionary and repressive forms. Among important sectors of the urban petty-bourgeois grew discontent against the regime.
Given the systematic repression and annihilation of the revolutionary communist opposition, new ideologies and movements begin to direct the opposition struggles against the regime. These movements reflected the aspirations of a sector of the middle bourgeoisie and the petty-bourgeois, excluded from representation within the pro-imperialist regime. Already heavily influenced by Western and distant bourgeois ideas of socialism and communism, this group sought more voice and political participation. At the same time, numerous workers, students and women organizations would be formed in South Korean territory.
In 1979, new mass protests shake South Korea again. A new crisis opens within the regime, and Pak Chung Hee would be murdered by a KCIA member. Nowadays, many bourgeois economists and sociologists consider the reactionary and anti-people regime of Pak Chung Hee as responsible for the “economic miracle” of South Korea, and the policies implemented in this period are presented as “model” for developing countries. At this time, Pak Chung Hee came to power speaking of “economic self-sufficiency” and deepened the implementation of a import replacement program.
Shortly after the assassination of Pak Chung Hee, Chun Doo Hwan, reactionary element, leads another coup and gives rise to a new military regime in South Korea. In 1980, he would be the South Korean fascist chief, chiefly responsible for the crimes against humanity committed in the city of Gwangju during the same year.

As we speak, the present date of May 18, 2020 marks the 40th anniversary of the Gwangju Levant. This important event marked the beginning of the crisis of the military dictatorship sponsored by US imperialism, exerting a powerful influence on the struggle of the South Korean popular masses. The Levant was brutally repressed by the South Korean army, leaving deep marks in South Korean society. The degree of combativity demonstrated by the working class and the students of the city is of great inspiration not only for the democratic and progressive movements of Asia, but also in other parts of the world.
The origin of the Popular Levant of Gwangju dates back to massive student demonstrations, which began in Seoul, May 14, and soon expanded to other regions of South Korea, such as Busan and Gwangju. The students protested against the military dictatorship, claimed the democratization of South Korean society and the end of martial law. University campuses across the country have been occupied. Feeling the pressures of the government and concerned about the consequences of the demonstrations, the student leaders canceled new street acts. The government did not go back to its opposition and sent the army to various regions of the country, including Gwangju, where the students had occupied the National University of Cheonam. On May 16, students at Gwangju held demonstrations in front of the Provincial Palace, which was renamed the “Praça da Democracia” and left in a torch parade.
On May 17, many leaders of the Gwangju movement were arrested, as the army had already shifted its intelligence to act in the city. At national level, several political leaders were arrested. Authorized by Washington, General John Wickman had released the use of paratrooper forces, which were displaced by orders from Chun Doo Hwan to Gwangju. Upon arriving in Gwangju, the troops terrorized and humiliated the city's population.
On May 18, reacting to the violations and repression that were victims, protests in Gwangju acquire a more radicalized character and evolve into open clashes against the army. Students began to widely use molotov cocktails, organizing teams responsible for their production and pitches during protests. People of the most varied social strata begin to spontaneously join the demonstrations. When the proletariat entered the scene, the military reacted violently, indiscriminately shooting the people who participated in the protests. Bus and taxi drivers also took part in the movement, using their vehicles as protesters' shields, to the extent that piles of bodies were forming in the streets and the rescue of people was almost impossible, due to the frenetic shots fired by the military. People reacted with what they had at their fingertips: stones, baseball bats, iron bars, bamboo, etc. On May 19, the military began to use flamethrowers against protesters, incinerating dozens of people.
On May 20, a mutilated body is found, which contributed to further enraging the Gwangju population. Thousands of people gather in the city centre and sing the song “Our desire is reunification”. The march of the protesters gathered about two hundred thousand people and again were received with indiscriminate repression. At a certain time, the protesters formed action groups that took the National Guard facilities, and several prisoners were released. Repression continued violently.
On May 21, the struggle intensifies with the entrance of the workers of the Asia Motors factory. Many residents of Gwangju approached the factory to ask the workers to engage in the struggle. Factory workers accepted the request, stopped production and provided various vehicles for protesters. About 414 military vehicles were donated to protesters. Then a column of workers, driving the vehicles they had produced, arrives in Gwangju to participate in the uprising. At a certain time, protesters formed action groups that took the National Guard facilities and several prisoners were released. Plant workers, fishermen and miners from localities near Gwangju also went to the city, bringing with them weapons and ammunition.
Popular militias – called the “Civil Army” – took over the city, expelling the military, playing a role of “leadership” of the uprising. With the military outside the city, Gwangju became a mume kind of “commune”, with the emergence of quite embryonic forms of new social relations. The spirit of solidarity that was created in society during the days of the uprising is somewhat commented and analyzed in studies on events in Gwangju. Kim Il Sung, then president of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (North Korea), said the People's Levant of Gwangju “was the first massive uprising of the world after the Paris Commune.” [4]
We need to emphasize that the Popular Levant of Gwangju, although it was classified by the South Korean military as a “Communist armed council organized by North Korea”, had in spontaneity one of its main brands. As always, the anti-communism flag was used to justify the massacre and attacks on the masses.
On May 27, the government shifts the special troops stationed in the Demilitarized Zone of Korea (front with the DPRK) to occupy the city of Gwangju and militarily crush the armed resistance of the popular militias formed by the students and workers.

The displacement of troops to the city of Gwangju was approved by General John Wickman, then commander of the Combined Command Forces of the Republic of Korea and the United States. U.S. imperialism’s political and ideologists gave public statements “condemning” any violation of the rights of protesters, while, under the cloths, they conspired and gave authorizations to the reactionary military regime. The gigantic majority of the armaments, ammunition and vehicles used in the repression against the people of the city were provided to the South Korean puppet state by US imperialism. The repression of the Popular Levant was also endorsed by Jimmy Carter, then President of the United States, Zbigniew Brzezinski, National Security Advisor and Richard Holbrooke, Assistant Secretary of State. The great concern of the ideologists of imperialism was to keep the “stability” of the fascist regime and, as it could not fail to be, to fight the ghost of communism. Jimmy Carter, during his electoral campaign, defended the idea of withdrawing U.S. troops stationed in the Korean peninsula, but went to history as a character who collaborated with one of the bloodiest episodes committed by the South Korean regime and imperialism.

As we spoke earlier, President Kim Il Sung came to compare the Popular Levant of Gwangju with the Paris Commune. In fact, there are several similarities between the two events. The two emerged as urban armed insurrections, which established new mechanisms of popular participation and dismantled the mechanisms and repressive forces of the bourgeois state. Although in the case of the Paris Commune the workers' character was much more emphatic, in Gwangju the protests also had an essential participation of the workers, who even introduced a more combative and radicalized dynamic to the movement.
The differences lie in the fact that, politically, the movement in Gwangju is much more “confident” and spontaneous than the Paris Commune. A participant of the movement in Gwangju affirmed that many participants of the Popular Levant had the naive hope that the United States would come to save students, which demonstrates a certain incomprehension of the international political dynamics and the very situation in which they were inserted. Another fact that differentiates Gwangju from the Paris Commune is the fact that the first had an even more incipient duration than the second. The People's Levant of Gwangju lasted only ten days, and despite having instituted a civil committee that began to deliberate on the political affairs of the city, disbarred the repressive apparatus of the bourgeois state for a new military structure emerged from the people, could still not be considered a new power in the correct meaning of the term, given the very embryonic character of these new organizational forms. The events in Gwangju reveal, once again, that without a movement whose main core is the working class, and that besides, it is armed with a correct guiding ideology, greater victories are unsustainable. However, we cannot deny the historical importance of Gwangju Popular Lift and the historical experience of the South Korean popular masses. The Gwangju People's Lift showed that the enemy's forces can be faced with decision. The Levant also denounced the true character of the reactionary military regime and US imperialism. The example of the thousands of fighters who fought against reactionary oppression served as a boost to the overthrow of the fascist military dictatorship in 1987.

[1] Anna Louise Strong. In North Korea: First-Eye Report. Soviet Russia Today, New York: 1949
[2] Bruce Cummings. The Korean War – A History. The Modern Library, New York: 2011
[3] George Katsiafikas. Asia’s Unknown Uprisings – Volume I: South Korean Social Movements in the 20th Century. PM Press, Oakland: 2012
[4] Kim Il Sung. Selected Works – Volume 35. Foreign Language Press, Pyongyang: 1989
Master in Philosophy Marxist by the Normal University of Beijing
en_subtitle: On May 18, 1980, the heroic South Korean people took weapons to oppose the slaughter of the military-fascist regime of Chun Doo Hwan, sponsored by Yankee imperialism

title: Hamas vê como positivo cessar-fogo proposto por Biden
subtitle: A posição do Hamas sinaliza uma mudança de atitude por parte do grupo, que nos últimos meses acusou os EUA de se aliarem a Israel e de obstruir as tentativas de cessar-fogo
content:
- O grupo islâmico palestino Hamas disse na sexta-feira que tinha uma visão positiva do conteúdo de uma proposta de cessar-fogo em três fases anunciada pelo presidente dos EUA, Joe Biden, para um cessar-fogo permanente em Gaza.
"O Hamas confirma a sua disponibilidade para lidar de forma positiva e construtiva com qualquer proposta que se baseie no cessar-fogo permanente e na retirada total [das forças israelitas] da Faixa de Gaza, na reconstrução [de Gaza] e no regresso dos deslocados para os seus lugares, juntamente com o cumprimento de um acordo genuíno de troca de prisioneiros se a ocupação anunciar claramente o compromisso com tal acordo", disse o grupo num comunicado.
A posição do Hamas sinaliza uma mudança de atitude por parte do grupo, que nos últimos meses acusou os EUA de se aliarem a Israel e de obstruir as tentativas de cessar-fogo.
“O Hamas vê a posição de Biden agora mais focada em pressionar Israel a retornar às negociações com uma atitude diferente, ou eles (Israel) podem correr o risco de entrar em conflito com os americanos”, disse à Reuters uma autoridade palestina próxima aos esforços de mediação.
As divergências entre Biden e Netanyahu sobre as linhas vermelhas em Gaza criaram um potencial confronto entre os dois líderes, levantando questões sobre se os EUA poderão restringir a ajuda militar se Israel continuar a sua ofensiva no enclave agora devastado.
O gabinete do primeiro-ministro Benjamin Netanyahu disse que Israel autorizou os negociadores a apresentar um acordo de trégua em Gaza depois que Biden revelou detalhes do plano de cessar-fogo.
As autoridades de saúde palestinas estimam que mais de 36.280 pessoas foram mortas em Gaza desde que Israel atacou o enclave em resposta ao ataque do Hamas em 7 de outubro no sul de Israel. O ataque do Hamas matou cerca de 1.200 pessoas, segundo cálculos israelenses.
en_title: Hamas sees as a positive ceasefire proposed by Biden
en_content:
- The Palestinian Islamist group Hamas said on Friday that it had a positive view of the content of a three-phase ceasefire proposal announced by US President Joe Biden for a permanent ceasefire in Gaza.
" Hamas confirms its readiness to deal positively and constructively with any proposal based on the permanent cease-fire and the total withdrawal of the Gaza Strip, the reconstruction [of Gaza] and the return of displaced persons to their places, together with the fulfillment of a genuine prisoner exchange agreement if the occupation clearly announces the commitment to such agreement," the group said in a statement.
Hamas' position marks a change of attitude by the group, which in recent months accused the US of allying with Israel and obstructing attempts to cease fire.
“ Hamas sees Biden’s position now more focused on pressing Israel to return to negotiations with a different attitude, or they (Israel) may risk conflicting with the Americans,” said Reuters a Palestinian authority close to mediation efforts.
The differences between Biden and Netanyahu on the red lines in Gaza created a potential confrontation between the two leaders, raising questions about whether the US could restrict military aid if Israel continues its offensive in the now devastated enclave.
Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's office said that Israel authorized negotiators to file a truce agreement in Gaza after Biden revealed details of the ceasefire plan.
Palestinian health authorities estimate that more than 36,280 people have been killed in Gaza since Israel attacked the enclave in response to the Hamas attack on 7 October in southern Israel. The Hamas attack killed about 1,200 people, according to Israeli calculations.
en_subtitle: Hamas' position signals a change of attitude by the group, which in recent months accused the US of allying with Israel and obstructing attempts to cease fire

title: Netanyahu é convidado a discursar perante o Congresso norte-americano
subtitle: Parlamentares dos EUA criticaram o Hamas, grupo islâmico da Faixa de Gaza
content:
- Parlamentares democratas e republicanos do Congresso norte-americano convidaram o primeiro-ministro de Israel, Benjamin Netanyahu, para discursar no Legislativo. A informação foi divulgada por Mike Johnson, líder republicano da Câmara dos Representantes. O relato foi publicado na Agência Lusa. 
"Estamos com o Estado de Israel na sua luta contra o terrorismo, especialmente neste momento em que o Hamas ainda mantém cativos cidadãos norte-americanos e israelitas e os seus líderes põem em perigo a estabilidade regional", afirmaram quatro líderes parlamentares da Câmara dos Representantes (câmara baixa) e do Senado (câmara alta), no convite ao chefe do Governo israelita.
Autoridades da África do Sul denunciaram o governo de Israel na Corte Internacional de Justiça pelo crime de genocídio. Números divulgados pelo Ministério da Saúde da Faixa de Gaza apontaram que mais de 36 mil palestinos morreram desde outubro do ano passado vítimas dos bombardeios das forças israelenses. 
Ao receber a denúncia este ano, a CIJ apenas recomendou a paralisação do massacre. As forças militares de Israel continuaram as ofensivas em Gaza. Nos últimos meses, lideranças internacionais e ativistas aumentaram a pressão contra o Tribunal Penal Internacional para emitir um mandado de prisão de Netanyahu.
en_title: Netanyahu is invited to speak before the American Congress
en_content:
- Democratic and Republican parliamentarians of the U.S. Congress invited Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to speak in the legislature. The information was released by Mike Johnson, the Republican leader of the House of Representatives. The report was published in the Lusa Agency.
"We are with the State of Israel in its fight against terrorism, especially at this time when Hamas still holds captive American and Israeli citizens and their leaders endanger regional stability," said four parliamentary leaders of the House of Representatives (low chamber) and the Senate (high chamber) in the invitation to the head of the Israeli government.
Authorities from South Africa denounced the government of Israel at the International Court of Justice for the crime of genocide. Numbers released by the Ministry of Health of the Gaza Strip pointed out that more than 36,000 Palestinians have died since October last year victims of the bombing of the Israeli forces.
By receiving the complaint this year, the CIJ only recommended the stoppage of the massacre. Israel's military forces continued the offensive in Gaza. In recent months, international leaders and activists have increased pressure against the International Criminal Court to issue a arrest warrant for Netanyahu.
en_subtitle: U.S. parliamentarians have criticized Hamas, the Islamic group of the Gaza Strip

title: EUA voltam a ameaçar China com sanções por apoio à Rússia
subtitle: O governo Biden intensificou as advertências sobre o apoio de Pequim a Moscou e emitiu uma ordem executiva que ameaçava medidas punitivas contra instituições financeiras da China
content:
- Os Estados Unidos e outras nações poderiam tomar medidas contra empresas e instituições financeiras chinesas devido ao apoio de Pequim à Rússia, disse uma importante autoridade norte-americana nesta sexta-feira (31).
Em dezembro, a administração Biden intensificou as advertências sobre o apoio de Pequim a Moscou e emitiu uma ordem executiva que ameaçava medidas punitivas contra instituições financeiras que ajudassem a Rússia a contornar as sanções ocidentais.
"Acho que estamos principalmente focados nas empresas chinesas que têm estado envolvidas de forma sistemática no apoio à Rússia. Também analisamos atentamente as instituições financeiras", disse o vice-secretário de Estado dos EUA, Kurt Campbell, quando questionado se a liderança chinesa e os bancos poderiam ser visados, segundo a Reuters.
No início desta semana, Campbell disse que havia "uma necessidade urgente" de os países europeus e da OTAN enviarem uma mensagem coletiva de preocupação à China.
"Haverá medidas que serão tomadas, não apenas pelos Estados Unidos, mas por outros países, sinalizando o nosso profundo descontentamento com o que a China está tentando fazer em sua relação com a Rússia no campo de batalha na Ucrânia", acrescentou o vice-secretário de Estado norte-americano.
Anteriormente, Pequim classificou as sanções já impostas pelos EUA e pela União Europeia como "ilegais", conforme noticiado.
en_title: USA again threaten China with sanctions for Russia's support
en_content:
- The United States and other nations could take measures against Chinese companies and financial institutions due to Beijing's support to Russia, said an important US authority on Friday (31).
In December, the Biden administration intensified warnings about Beijing's support for Moscow and issued an executive order that threatened punitive measures against financial institutions that helped Russia bypass Western sanctions.
" I think we are mainly focused on Chinese companies that have been systematically involved in support of Russia. We also carefully analyzed the financial institutions," said U.S. Deputy Secretary of State Kurt Campbell, when asked whether Chinese leadership and banks could be targeted, according to Reuters.
Earlier this week, Campbell said there was "an urgent need" for European and NATO countries to send a collective message of concern to China.
"There will be measures that will be taken, not only by the United States, but by other countries, signaling our deep discontent with what China is trying to do in its relationship with Russia on the battlefield in Ukraine," the US Deputy Secretary of State added.
Previously, Beijing classified the sanctions already imposed by the US and the European Union as "illegal" as reported.
en_subtitle: The Biden government intensified warnings about Beijing's support to Moscow and issued an executive order that threatened punitive measures against financial institutions in China

title: Biden leva EUA ao risco de 3ª Guerra Mundial ao permitir ataques na Rússia, diz ex-agente da CIA
subtitle: "Estamos nos envolvendo, cada vez mais, em uma guerra que poderia ter sido evitada e para a qual a única justificativa dada foi 'enfraquecer' a Rússia", disse Philip Giraldi
content:
O governo Biden mergulhou gradualmente os Estados Unidos na guerra da Ucrânia com a Rússia e colocou o país no caminho de uma potencial Terceira Guerra Mundial termonuclear.
É o que disse, o ex-analista da CIA e ex-oficial de inteligência do Exército dos EUA, Philip Giraldi à Sputnik nesta sexta-feira (31).
"Isso é horrível! Estamos nos envolvendo, cada vez mais, em uma guerra que poderia ter sido evitada e para a qual a única justificativa plausível dada foi 'enfraquecer' a Rússia", disse Giraldi.
As tensões EUA-Rússia, que já são piores do que têm sido desde a crise dos mísseis cubanos de 1962, mergulharam ainda mais na quinta-feira (30), quando a mídia dos EUA informou que o presidente Joe Biden já havia dado permissão à Ucrânia para usar armas dos EUA para atacar dentro da Rússia, supostamente perto da região da Carcóvia.
"A Rússia, por sua vez, alertou que qualquer escalada da OTAN [Organização do Tratado do Atlântico Norte] e/ou dos Estados Unidos será respondida com a utilização de todas as capacidades de Moscovo para se defender", cravou Giraldi.
O antigo analista da CIA alertou que esta decisão poderia se transformar em um ponto sem retorno no desencadeamento de uma guerra direta entre os Estados Unidos e a Rússia.
"Fornecer à Ucrânia armas que serão usadas para atacar profundamente a Rússia será visto como um ato de guerra e o que se desenvolverá a partir disso poderá ser catastrófico para todos os envolvidos", alertou Giraldi.
en_title: Biden takes US at the risk of World War III by allowing attacks in Russia, says former CIA agent
en_content:
The Biden government gradually plunged the United States into the war of Ukraine with Russia and placed the country on the way to a potential Third thermonuclear World War.
That's what I said, former CIA analyst and former U.S. Army intelligence officer, Philip Giraldi to Sputnik on Friday (31).
"That's horrible! We are becoming increasingly involved in a war that could have been avoided and for which the only plausible justification given was 'to weaken' Russia", said Giraldi.
U.S.-Russian tensions, which are already worse than have been since the 1962 Cuban missile crisis, further dived on Thursday (30), when the U.S. media reported that President Joe Biden had already given permission to Ukraine to use U.S. weapons to attack within Russia, allegedly near the Carcovia region.
"Russia, in turn, warned that any NATO escalation [Organization of the North Atlantic Treaty] and/or the United States will be responded with the use of all Moscow's capabilities to defend itself," she enslaved Giraldi.
The former CIA analyst warned that this decision could turn into a point without return in triggering a direct war between the United States and Russia.
"To provide Ukraine with weapons that will be used to attack Russia deeply will be seen as an act of war and what will develop from this may be catastrophic for all involved," Giraldi warned.
en_subtitle: "We are becoming increasingly involved in a war that could have been avoided and for which the only justification given was 'to weaken' Russia," said Philip Giraldi

title: Amorim rebate críticas de Zelensky e diz que o 'Brasil respeita o sofrimento do povo ucraniano'
subtitle: "Queremos contribuir para uma paz alcançável. Isso só será possível se levarmos em consideração as preocupações das partes, o que pressupõe diálogo entre elas", disse Celso Amorim
content:
O assessor-chefe da Assessoria Especial do presidente Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva (PT), Celso Amorim, rebateu as críticas do presidente ucraniano, Volodymyr Zelensky, e afirmou que o governo brasileiro tem conversado sobre a guerra na Ucrânia com vários interlocutores, inclusive ocidentais. Segundo ele, todos reconhecem o papel que a China exerce nesse processo.
“Respeitamos o sofrimento do povo ucraniano. Queremos contribuir para uma paz alcançável. Isso só será possível se levarmos em consideração as preocupações das partes, o que pressupõe diálogo entre elas, preferencialmente com apoio de países que gozem de confiança de ambos”, disse Amorim ao jornal 
Ainda conforme o diplomata, “quem ler com atenção a declaração conjunta sino-brasileira verá que há recado para todos, inclusive para a Rússia, cuja ação militar sem autorização da ONU o governo brasileiro nunca deixou de criticar”. Na semana passada, Brasil e China lançaram uma proposta conjunta para negociações de paz, enfatizando a inclusão tanto da Rússia quanto da Ucrânia. Esta proposta foi consolidada após uma reunião em Pequim entre Celso Amorim e o chanceler chinês Wang Yi.
As declarações de Celso Amorim foram feitas após Zelensky insinuar que o Brasil estaria aliado à posição russa na Guerra na Ucrânia por razões comerciais. O mandatário ucraniano também demonstrou preocupação com a esperada ausência de Lula em uma conferência de paz convocada pela Suíça, este mês, para discutir a paz, para a qual a Rússia não foi convidada.
en_title: Amorim reviews Zelensky and says that 'Brazil respects the suffering of the Ukrainian people'
en_content:
President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva (PT), Celso Amorim, rebate the criticisms of the Ukrainian president, Volodymyr Zelensky, and stated that the Brazilian government has talked about the war in Ukraine with several interlocutors, including Westerners. According to him, everyone recognizes the role China plays in this process.
“We respect the suffering of the Ukrainian people. We want to contribute to achieving peace. This will only be possible if we take into account the concerns of the parties, which presupposes dialogue between them, preferably with the support of countries that enjoy the trust of both ", Amorim told the newspaper
Still according to the diplomat, “who carefully read the Sino-Brazilian joint statement will see that there is a message for everyone, including for Russia, whose military action without UN authorization the Brazilian government has never ceased to criticize”. Last week, Brazil and China launched a joint proposal for peace negotiations, emphasizing the inclusion of both Russia and Ukraine. This proposal was consolidated after a meeting in Beijing between Celso Amorim and the Chinese Chancellor Wang Yi.
Celso Amorim's statements were made after Zelensky insinuated that Brazil would be allied to the Russian position in the War in Ukraine for commercial reasons. The Ukrainian Mandate also demonstrated concern about the expected absence of Lula in a peace conference convened by Switzerland this month to discuss peace, for which Russia was not invited.
en_subtitle: "We want to contribute to achieving peace. This will only be possible if we take into account the concerns of the parties, which presupposes dialogue between them," said Col. Amorim

title: Privatizar o litoral, uma insanidade
subtitle: Interesses econômicos poderosos estão por trás dessa proposta de emenda constitucional já aprovada pela Câmara
content:
Chegar a ser imoral a discussão da chamada PEC da privatização das praias em meio à devastação do Rio Grande do Sul por um evento climático extremo, agravado pela negligência dos gestores locais.
Danos ambientais de efeitos incalculáveis adviriam da entrega dos terrenos de marinha, vale dizer, de quase todo o litoral, aos atuais ocupantes privados e a prefeituras, de onde passariam rapidamente às mãos de grupos imobiliários interessados em transformar a costa brasileira num Caribe, ou numa vasta Cancún, como disse o trêfego Neymar.
Interesses econômicos poderosos estão por trás dessa proposta de emenda constitucional já aprovada pela Câmara sem que o país se desse conta, e relatada no Senado pelo senador Flávio Bolsonaro. Grupos nacionais e internacionais de hotelaria, associados a construtoras e incorporadoras, planejam grandes empreendimentos em diferentes pontos da costa, especialmente no Nordeste.
Neymar, que já havia anunciado parceria com uma construtora para a construção de um condomínio, ao sair em defesa da PEC, sofreu um espancamento virtual em regra da atriz Luana Piovani. A treta ajudou a jogar luz sobre o assunto. Ponto para Luana.
A esta turma dos hotéis, resorts e condomínios junta-se o lobby dos cassinos, que nunca deixou de atuar no Congresso. O projeto de lei número 442/1991, também já aprovado pela Câmara e esperando para ser votado no Senado, autoriza a abertura de um cassino em cada estado, fora Rio, São Paulo e Minas, que poderiam ter três cada um.  E  haveria mais um em  cada polo turístico definido como patrimônio natural da Humanidade: Fernando de Noronha, Pantanal, Anavilhanas, Costa do Descobrimento e outros mais.
A farra do capital predatório e da lavagem de dinheiro seria completa com a aprovação do PL 442 e da PEC, que pelo menos por ora, parece ter sido contida pelo alarido. Não é uma urgência, decidiu o presidente do Senado, Rodrigo Pacheco.
Os tais terrenos de marinha, que a PEC quer tirar da União e passar para particulares (os já ocupados) e para prefeituras,  compõem uma faisa que começa 33 metros depois do ponto máximo alcançado pelas marés. Isso deixa livres a praia e o quebra-mar. Esta parte, que o povo frequenta, continuaria sendo pública. Por isso é incorreto falar em privatização das praias mas, onde brotar um condomínio ou resort, o acesso pode ser barrado. Isso já acontece hoje em alguns lugares para endinheirados.
Mais de 500 mil terrenos são ocupados por pessoas cadastradas junto à Secretaria do Patrimônio da União-SPU(Ministério da Gestão). As taxas que pagam, laudêmios, renderam mais de um bilhão de reais ao governo em 2023.
Espoliar a União nem é o problema. Estes terrenos,  como explicam os técnicos do Ministério do Meio Ambiente, estão sob a influência das marés e devem sofrer os efeitos da elevação do nível dos oceanos, em  consequência do aquecimento global e do degelo crescente no Ártico. Os mangues e as restingas ficariam desprotegidos e poderiam até ser eliminados, e eles funcionam como barreiras naturais contra eventos extremos ligados ao mar. A biodiversidade litorânea também ficaria ameaçada.
Algo precisa ser feito no litoral para prevenir tragédias climáticas mas é o oposto do que propõe a PEC. O professor  Carlos Nobre, único brasileiro reconhecido como “guardião planetário”, o seleto grupo de lideranças empenhadas em resolver a crise climática,  recomenda um plano de longo prazo para a retirada das comunidades que ocupam terrenos de marinha, antes que sobrevenham o aumento das marés e as ressacas mais fortes, entre outros eventos inevitáveis.
Isso é prevenção, algo que o Brasil precisa começar a fazer com urgência, como ensina a tragédia do Rio Grande do Sul.
en_title: Privatizing the coast, an insanity
en_content:
The discussion of the so-called PEC of the privatization of the beaches amid the devastation of Rio Grande do Sul by an extreme climate event, aggravated by the neglect of local managers.
Environmental damage of incalculable effects adviriam from the delivery of marine land, it is worth saying, from almost all the coastline, to the current private occupants and prefectures, from where they would quickly pass into the hands of real estate groups interested in transforming the Brazilian coast into a Caribbean, or a vast Cancún, as the Neymar traffic said.
Powerful economic interests are behind this proposed constitutional amendment already approved by the House without the country giving up, and reported in the Senate by Senator Flávio Bolsonaro. National and international hotel groups, associated with builders and developers, plan large ventures at different points of the coast, especially in the Northeast.
Neymar, who had already announced a partnership with a constructor for the construction of a condominium, when leaving in defense of the PEC, suffered a virtual beating as a rule of actress Luana Piovani. The bullshit helped to play light on the subject. Point to Luana.
To this class of hotels, resorts and condominiums joins the casino lobby, which has never stopped acting in Congress. The bill number 442/1991, also approved by the House and waiting to be voted in the Senate, authorizes the opening of a casino in each state, outside Rio, São Paulo and Minas, which could have three each. And there would be one more in each tourist hub defined as the natural heritage of Humanity: Fernando de Noronha, Pantanal, Anavilhanas, Costa do Descobrimento and others.
The burden of predatory capital and money laundering would be complete with the approval of PL 442 and PEC, which at least for now appears to have been contained by the alarido. It is not an emergency, decided the president of the Senate, Rodrigo Pacheco.
Such marine grounds, which the PEC wants to take from the Union and move to private individuals (the already busy ones) and to prefectures, compose a spark that begins 33 meters after the maximum point reached by the tides. It frees the beach and breaks the sea. This part, which the people attend, would remain public. Therefore it is incorrect to talk about privatization of the beaches but, where sprouting a condominium or resort, access can be barred. This already happens today in some places for endinheirados.
More than 500,000 land is occupied by persons registered with the Secretariat of the Union-SPU Heritage (Ministry of Management). The fees they pay, laudêmios, earned more than one billion reais to the government in 2023.
The Union is not even the problem. These areas, as explained by the Ministry of the Environment, are under the influence of tides and must suffer the effects of rising ocean level, as a result of global warming and growing defrost in the Arctic. The mangroves and reins would be unprotected and could even be eliminated, and they function as natural barriers against extreme events linked to the sea. Coastal biodiversity would also be threatened.
Something needs to be done on the coast to prevent climatic tragedies but it is the opposite of what PEC proposes. Professor Carlos Nobre, the only Brazilian recognized as “planetary guardian”, the select group of leaders committed to solving the climate crisis, recommends a long-term plan for the withdrawal of communities occupying marine lands, before the increase of tides and the strongest hangovers, among other inevitable events.
This is prevention, something that Brazil needs to start doing urgently, as the Rio Grande do Sul tragedy teaches.
en_subtitle: Powerful economic interests are behind this proposed constitutional amendment already approved by the House

title: Até a tática engana-mané não falha
subtitle: “A repercussão de crueldades e mentiras da extrema direita é mais efetiva do que a reação aos esforços de Lula”, escreve o colunista Moisés Mendes.
content:
O estagiário de gestão pública da Câmara dos Deputados e o estagiário de direito penal do Supremo sabem de coisas que seus chefes não sabem ou fingem não querer saber. 
O estagiário da Câmara sabe que Lula se esforça para salvar o Rio Grande do Sul, mas não consegue ver essa dedicação percebida na sua real dimensão pelos próprios gaúchos, porque a sabotagem ao socorro começa com a direita e a extrema direita do Congresso.
E o estagiário do Supremo sabe que, enquanto Lula se dedicava aos planos de recuperação do Rio Grande e à gestão dos dribles que leva na Câmara e no Senado, três deputados bolsonaristas estavam em Buenos Aires pedindo asilo a condenados pelo 8 de janeiro pelo STF e que viraram foragidos.
Os dois estagiários sabem que os deputados Eduardo Bolsonaro, Júlia Zanatta e Marcel Van Hattem foram à Argentina jogar para a torcida, porque a idiotia de Javier Milei não chegaria ao ponto de afrontar o Brasil com asilo para os manés traídos pelos golpistas.
Mas os estagiários sabem que, mesmo jogando para suas torcidas, os três deputados fidelizaram suas bases e até alargaram seus apoios muito mais do que Lula conseguiu no esforço para dizer que o socorro aos gaúchos é mais relevante do que o arcabouço fiscal.
A tática engana-mané dos deputados que foram fazer o teatro do socorro aos foragidos é mais efetiva do que a dedicação de Lula às urgências gaúchas. Até os socorridos por Lula enxergam menos o que ele faz, no confronto com os agradecidos aos deputados pela encenação que fizeram na Argentina.
É um resumo que parece grosseiro, mas é a realidade. Porque o poder de articulação do fascismo foi restabelecido, a capacidade de comunicação em redes sociais está viva e renovada e as fake news, agora com aval do Congresso, chegaram a outro patamar.
O bolsonarismo transformou direita e centro em linha auxiliar da extrema direita, não só para empreitadas, e por isso consegue produzir em Buenos Aires, como espetáculo, o que Lula nem sempre consegue mostrar como ação de governo. O espetáculo deles é para todos, para extrema direita, centro e direita.
Nesse cenário, não há como duvidar que, se andasse de jet ski hoje no Guaíba, Bolsonaro conseguiria mais repercussão com sua performance do que Lula no encontro com os desabrigados. 
A foto de Lula com as vítimas da enchente, em São Leopoldo, em maio, não saiu na capa de nenhum jornalão. Nenhum. Todos esconderam a imagem. 
Mas todos os jornalões davam em manchetes as motociatas com os tios do zap vestidos de preto. E mostravam com destaque os passeios do sujeito de jet ski em Santa Catarina. 
Bolsonaro queria produzir e disseminar aquelas imagens, mesmo que as esquerdas achassem que aquilo era contra ele. Não era. Bolsonaro queria exposição, para fidelizar sua gente e atrair mais gente da direita.
É o que os congressistas fizeram com a sabotagem aos controles das fake news e à saidinha de presos. Jogaram para a galera, estreitaram laços e expandiram alcances. Tudo porque centristas, direitistas e fascistas disputam agora quase a mesma audiência e o mesmo eleitorado.
O que fazer? Se alguém souber, que avise os estagiários. Porque um estagiário enxerga coisas que seus orientadores muitas vezes não enxergam ou não querem enxergar.
en_title: Even the deceit-mane tactic does not fail
en_content:
The public management intern of the Chamber of Deputies and the intern of criminal law of the Supreme know of things that their bosses do not know or pretend they do not want to know.
The intern of the House knows that Lula strives to save the Rio Grande do Sul, but cannot see this dedication perceived in its real dimension by the gauchos themselves, because the sabotage to help begins with the right and the extreme right of Congress.
And the intern of the Supreme knows that, while Lula was dedicated to the recovery plans of the Rio Grande and the management of the dribles that he takes in the House and in the Senate, three Pocarnarist deputies were in Buenos Aires asking asylum to convicts on January 8 by the Supreme Court and who turned out.
The two interns know that the deputies Eduardo Bolsonaro, Júlia Zanatta and Marcel Van Hattem went to Argentina to play for the cheer, because Javier Milei's idiocy would not reach the point of facing Brazil with asylum for the manes betrayed by the coupists.
But the interns know that, even playing for their fans, the three deputies have relied on their bases and even extended their support much more than Lula did in the effort to say that the help to the gauchos is more relevant than the tax framework.
The deceit-mane tactic of the deputies who were doing the theater of help to the fugitives is more effective than the dedication of Lula to the gaucho urgentities. Even the members of Lula see less what he does, in the confrontation with the grateful to the deputies for the stage they did in Argentina.
It's an abstract that looks gross, but it's reality. Because the power of articulation of fascism has been restored, the ability to communicate on social networks is alive and renewed and the fake news, now with the endorsement of Congress, has reached another level.
Pocketarism has transformed right and center in the auxiliary line of the extreme right, not only for contractors, and therefore manages to produce in Buenos Aires, as a spectacle, what Lula can not always show as government action. Their spectacle is for everyone, for extreme right, center and right.
In this scenario, there is no doubt that if you were riding jet skiing today in Guaíba, Bolsonaro would achieve more repercussion with his performance than Lula in the meeting with the homeless.
The photo of Lula with the victims of the flood, in São Leopoldo, in May, did not leave on the cover of any newspaper. None. Everyone hid the image.
But all the newspapers gave in headlines the motorcycles with the uncles of the zap dressed in black. And they featured the tours of the jet ski subject in Santa Catarina.
Bolsonaro wanted to produce and disseminate those images, even if the left thought it was against him. It wasn't. Bolsonaro wanted exposure, to loyalty his people and attract more people from the right.
That's what congressmen did with sabotage to the controls of fake news and the prisoner's skirt. They played for the galley, narrowed ties and expanded ranges. All because centrists, rightists and fascists now quarrel almost the same audience and the same electorate.
What to do? If anyone knows, let the interns know. Because an intern sees things that his advisors often do not see or do not want to see.
en_subtitle: " The repercussion of cruelties and lies of the extreme right is more effective than the reaction to Lula’s efforts”, writes columnist Moses Mendes.

title: Pelo menos 5 civis são mortos em novo bombardeio ucraniano em Donetsk
subtitle: Forças Armadas da Ucrânia teriam bombardeado 22 vezes a região russa
content:
- O líder da República Popular de Donetsk (RPD), Denis Pushilin, confirmou que cinco pessoas morreram e três ficaram feridas por causa dos recentes bombardeios ucranianos na região.
"Cinco civis da república foram mortos e outros três ficaram feridos pelas ações criminosas das Forças Armadas ucranianas", declarou.
Pushilin resumiu que, nesta quinta-feira (31), as Forças Armadas da Ucrânia bombardearam 22 vezes a região russa, lançando 66 munições de foguetes e artilharia de calibre 155 mm, incluindo de fragmentação, assim como drones suicidas.
Enquanto civis russos são mortos pelas ações de Kiev, as nações aliadas da Organização do Tratado do Atlântico Norte (OTAN) permitem cada vez mais que as Forças Armadas ucranianas atinjam territórios dentro da Rússia com suas armas de longo alcance.
O presidente da Rússia, Vladimir Putin, afirmou repetidamente que um dos objetivos da operação especial é criar uma zona-tampão entre seu país e a Ucrânia para impedir mais ataques do tipo.
en_title: At least 5 civilians are killed in new Ukrainian bombing in Donetsk
en_content:
- The leader of the People's Republic of Donetsk (RPD), Denis Pushilin, confirmed that five people died and three were injured because of the recent Ukrainian bombings in the region.
"Five civilians of the republic were killed and three others were injured by the criminal actions of the Ukrainian Armed Forces," he said.
Pushilin summarized that on Thursday (31), the Ukrainian Armed Forces bombed 22 times the Russian region, launching 66 rocket ammunition and 155 mm caliber artillery, including fragmentation, as well as suicide drones.
While Russian civilians are killed by the actions of Kiev, the allied nations of the North Atlantic Treaty Organization (NATO) increasingly allow the Ukrainian Armed Forces to reach territories within Russia with their long-range weapons.
Russian President Vladimir Putin repeatedly stated that one of the objectives of the special operation is to create a buffer zone between his country and Ukraine to prevent further attacks of the type.
en_subtitle: Ukraine Armed Forces would have bombed 22 times the Russian region

title: Correia: 'que a condenação de Trump ajude a derrota nas urnas. No Brasil, Bolsonaro está inelegível e será preso'
subtitle: De acordo com o parlamentar, "a democracia americana é falha no que tange à tentativa de golpe, nos disseram os parlamentares da CPI do Capitólio"
content:
- O deputado federal Rogério Correia (PT-MG) publicou nesta quinta-feira (30) uma mensagem comparando Jair Bolsonaro (PL) e o ex-presidente dos Estados Unidos Donald Trump (Partido Republicano), declarado culpado pela Justiça de Nova York. 
"Trump, como Bolsonaro, é da direita neofascista. A democracia americana é falha no que tange à tentativa de golpe, nos disseram os  parlamentares da CPI do Capitólio. Que a condenação ajude a derrota nas urnas. No Brasil Bolsonaro está inelegível e será preso", escreveu o parlamentar na rede social X. 
O ex-presidente foi acusado de 34 crimes de falsificação de registros de pagamentos feitos a duas mulheres, incluindo a atriz pornô Stormy Daniels, para silenciá-las sobre seus supostos casos. A pena máxima possível pela soma das acusações contra Trump pode chegar a 136 anos de prisão.
Conforme as investigações, Trump teria pago US$ 130 mil (R$ 676,4 mil) à atriz para não afetar a campanha presidencial em 2016, quando venceu a candidata democrata Hillary Clinton.
O republicano declarou ser inocente e afirmou que não há base para o processo. Trump acredita que a perseguição é motivada politicamente e está relacionada com sua intenção de concorrer à presidência em 2024. Além disso, o ex-presidente alegou que vai "lutar até o fim" (com informações da Agência Sputnik).
en_title: Correia: 'Let Trump's condemnation help defeat in the polls. In Brazil, Bolsonaro is ineligible and will be arrested'
en_content:
- Congressman Rogério Correia (PT-MG) published on Thursday (30) a message comparing Jair Bolsonaro (PL) and former U.S. President Donald Trump ( Republican Party), found guilty by New York Justice.
"Trump, like Bolsonaro, is of the neo-fascist right. American democracy is a failure in the coup attempt, the parliamentarians of the Capitol CPI told us. May condemnation help defeat in the polls. In Brazil Bolsonaro is ineligible and will be arrested", wrote the parliamentarian on the social network X.
The former president was accused of 34 crimes of forgery of payment records made to two women, including porn actress Stormy Daniels, to silence them about their alleged cases. The maximum possible penalty for the sum of the charges against Trump can reach 136 years in prison.
According to the investigations, Trump would have paid $130,000 (R$676.4 thousand) to the actress not to affect the presidential campaign in 2016, when he won Democratic candidate Hillary Clinton.
The Republican declared himself innocent and stated that there is no basis for the process. Trump believes that persecution is politically motivated and is related to his intention to run for the presidency in 2024. In addition, the former president claimed that he will "fight to the end" (with information from the Sputnik Agency).
en_subtitle: According to the parliamentarian, "American democracy is a failure in the attempt to strike, the parliamentarians of the Capitol CPI told us"

title: Polícia Civil de SP não vai investigar agressão de PMs a estudantes em manifestação contra Tarcísio
subtitle: Policiais militares usaram a violência contra estudantes de direito que participavam de uma manifestação contra o governador
content:
A Polícia Civil de São Paulo afirmou à Universidade de São Paulo (USP) que não vai investigar a denúncia de agressão a estudantes registrada contra a Polícia Militar, informa a Folha de S.Paulo. Na semana passada, policiais militares usaram a violência contra estudantes de direito que participavam de uma manifestação contra o governador Tarcísio de Freitas (Republicanos), presente na universidade para a posse do procurador-geral de Justiça de SP, Paulo Sérgio de Oliveira e Costa.

Um dos motivos do protesto foi a aprovação da criação de escolas cívico-militares esta semana pelos deputados estaduais de São Paulo. De acordo com o projeto, a Secretaria da Educação seria responsável pela condução pedagógica nas instituições de ensino, e a Secretaria da Segurança Pública, pela administração e disciplina. Ex-ministro de Jair Bolsonaro (PL), Tarcísio foi o autor da proposta.

A direção da Faculdade de Direito registrou um boletim de ocorrência pedindo a apuração dos fatos. No entanto, o pedido foi indeferido. “Constata-se que o caso tem como suposto autor Policial Militar do Estado de São Paulo. Assim, o agente público competente para a apreciação dos fatos narrados é o Oficial Encarregado da Corregedoria da Polícia Militar do Estado de São Paulo", diz a resposta da Polícia Civil.

A Faculdade de Direito alega que a Polícia Civil tem a obrigação de apurar os fatos, já que trata da denúncia de um crime cometido pela PM. A Secretaria de Segurança Pública (SSP) também afirma que a própria Polícia Militar está analisando as imagens da ação e afirma que apura uma suposta tentativa de roubo de arma de um agente.
en_title: Civil Police of SP will not investigate aggression of PMs to students in demonstration against Tarcisio
en_content:
The Civil Police of São Paulo stated to the University of São Paulo (USP) that it will not investigate the complaint of aggression to students registered against the Military Police, informs Folha de S.Paulo. Last week, military policemen used violence against law students who participated in a demonstration against the governor Tarcisio de Freitas (Republicans), present at the university for possession of the Attorney General of Justice of SP, Paulo Sérgio de Oliveira and Costa.

One of the reasons for the protest was the approval of the creation of civic-military schools this week by state deputies of São Paulo. According to the project, the Department of Education would be responsible for the pedagogical conduction in educational institutions, and the Secretariat of Public Security, for administration and discipline. Former Minister of Jair Bolsonaro (PL), Tarcisio was the author of the proposal.

The direction of the Faculty of Law registered an occurrence bulletin requesting the clearance of the facts. However, the request was rejected. “It is said that the case has as alleged author Military Police of the State of São Paulo. Thus, the competent public agent for the appreciation of the facts narrated is the Officer Charged with the Correction of the Military Police of the State of São Paulo," says the Civil Police response.

The Faculty of Law alleges that the Civil Police have the obligation to investigate the facts, since it deals with the denunciation of a crime committed by the PM. The Public Security Secretariat (SSP) also states that the Military Police itself is analyzing the images of the action and states that it applies an alleged attempt to steal a weapon from an agent.
en_subtitle: Military police used violence against law students participating in a demonstration against the governor

title: Aliados de Nunes temem que Bolsonaro passe a apoiar Pablo Marçal para a Prefeitura de São Paulo
subtitle: O coach, que é chacota nas redes sociais, tem visões alinhadas ao bolsonarismo. Aliados de Nunes iniciam operação para garantir apoio de Bolsonaro
content:
Aliados do prefeito de São Paulo e candidato à reeleição, Ricardo Nunes (MDB), vão agir para impedir uma aproximação entre Jair Bolsonaro (PL) e o coach Pablo Marçal (PRTB). Com visões alinhadas ao bolsonarismo e com 7% das intenções de voto segundo a última pesquisa Datafolha, Marçal é visto como uma ameaça ao apoio de Bolsonaro a Nunes,
Pessoas próximas a Bolsonaro cobram que Ricardo Nunes faça gestos mais explícitos da aliança entre os dois. Bolsonaro é considerado o principal cabo eleitoral do atual prefeito, que chegou a participar da manifestação bolsonarista realizada em fevereiro na capital paulista. Além disso, Nunes deve aceitar a indicação do coronel da reserva Ricardo Mello Araújo (PL) para ser vice na sua chapa.
Nunes têm adotado uma parceria cautelosa com Bolsonaro, e não se manifestou nas eleições presidenciais de 2022. Bolsonaro foi derrotado por Lula e possui altos índices de rejeição na capital paulista, o que poderia prejudicar o crescimento do prefeito. Já Marçal, chacota nas redes sociais pelo seu posicionamento, fez campanha contra Lula.
en_title: Allies of Nunes fear that Bolsonaro will support Pablo Marçal for the City of São Paulo
en_content:
Allies of the mayor of São Paulo and candidate for re-election, Ricardo Nunes (MDB), will act to prevent an approximation between Jair Bolsonaro (PL) and coach Pablo Marçal (PRTB). With visions aligned to pocketarism and with 7% of the voting intentions according to the latest research Datafolha, Marçal is seen as a threat to the support of Bolsonaro to Nunes,
People near Bolsonaro charge that Ricardo Nunes make more explicit gestures of the alliance between the two. Bolsonaro is considered the main electoral cable of the current mayor, who came to participate in the Pocketarist demonstration held in February in the capital of São Paulo. In addition, Nunes must accept the nomination of the Colonel of the reserve Ricardo Mello Araújo (PL) to be vice in his plate.
Nunes have adopted a cautious partnership with Bolsonaro, and did not appear in the presidential elections of 2022. Bolsonaro was defeated by Lula and has high rates of rejection in the capital of São Paulo, which could harm the growth of the mayor. Marçal, chacota on social networks for his positioning, campaigned against Lula.
en_subtitle: The coach, who is chacota on social networks, has visions aligned to pocketarism. Nunes allies initiate operation to ensure Bolsonaro support

title: Odair Cunha: parceria estratégica do governo Lula com prefeituras impulsiona melhoria da qualidade de vida no país
subtitle: Entre as medidas destacam-se a manutenção dos 8% da alíquota previdenciária sobre a folha de pagamento das prefeituras
content:
- O líder do PT na Câmara, Odair Cunha (MG), destacou nesta sexta-feira (31) a importância da atuação do presidente Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva para aliviar a situação fiscal das prefeituras. Entre as medidas destacam-se a manutenção dos 8% da alíquota previdenciária sobre a folha de pagamento das prefeituras, novas regras para financiamento de dívidas e precatórios e facilitação de acordos para transferências de recursos da União.
“As medidas anunciadas na semana que passou, na 25º Marcha dos Prefeitos, em Brasília, são um avanço extraordinário para os 5.565 municípios brasileiros”, e mostram o “ forte respeito do PT e do atual governo aos municípios”, sublinhou o deputado, em artigo publicado na revista 
Para Odair Cunha, “superar diferenças políticas, com o interesse coletivo acima de tudo, pode dar lugar a atitudes colaborativas e harmônicas, de respeito às instituições. E é isso a marca do governo do PT e aliados. No lugar de um governo negacionista, elitista e autoritário, como era o anterior, temos hoje um transparente, que dialoga com as necessidades do povo brasileiro.”
“A lição que se tira é de que é possível avançar rumo à construção de uma país mais justo, sustentável  e desenvolvido com o entendimento. É assim que se faz política com 'P' maiúsculo, buscando estabelecer diálogo franco e sincero em torno daquilo que é possível.”
(*)
A atuação do presidente Lula para aliviar a situação fiscal das prefeituras do País  mostrou, mais uma vez, o forte respeito  do PT e do atual governo aos municípios. As medidas anunciadas na semana que passou, na 25º Marcha dos Prefeitos, em Brasília, são um avanço extraordinário para os 5.565 municípios brasileiros. Destacam-se, principalmente, a  manutenção dos 8% da alíquota previdenciária sobre a folha de pagamento das prefeituras, novas regras para financiamento de dívidas e precatórios e facilitação de acordos para transferências de recursos da União.
A presença do presidente na marcha significa a retomada da civilidade política. Com  postura democrática, republicana e federativa, mostrou respeito às diferenças, à pluralidade, à diversidade. Um gesto que encoraja a tolerância e coloca o interesse público e coletivo acima de qualquer diferença política e ideológica, ao contrário do governo anterior.
A desoneração previdenciária da seguridade para os municípios brasileiros foi fruto de um entendimento havido entre a Câmara dos Deputados, o Senado, o Supremo Tribunal Federal e o Poder Executivo. A construção desse consenso permitiu que as prefeituras ganhem fôlego para equilibrar suas contas no pós -pandemia, e, ao mesmo tempo, abriu caminho para o governo federal efetuar o ajuste fiscal.
A lição que se tira é de que é possível avançar rumo à construção de uma país mais justo, sustentável  e desenvolvido com o entendimento. É assim que se faz política com “P” maiúsculo, buscando estabelecer diálogo franco e sincero em torno daquilo que é possível.
O esforço para fortalecer os municípios é uma das metas do atual governo. As pessoas vivem nos municípios, dialogam com os prefeitos e as prefeitas, os vereadores e as vereadoras. Como disse Lula, não existe país rico com município pobre. É na cidade que as pessoas lutam por educação, saúde, lazer, moradia e emprego. Não é possível tomar medidas em âmbito nacional, com diferentes políticas públicas, sem levar em conta os municípios.
É crucial ter a compreensão clara de que o diálogo federativo é fundamental  para impulsionar ações que levem à melhoria da qualidade de vida do povo brasileiro.  Um exemplo de avanço construído a partir do entendimento é a aprovação da revolucionária reforma tributária, num processo que envolveu todos os entes federativos e a sociedade. Em lugar de um sistema burocrático, com um cipoal de regras que o tornam um dos mais complexos do planeta, teremos um novo arcabouço tributário , moderno , eficaz e simplificado.
Superar diferenças políticas, com o interesse coletivo acima de tudo, pode dar lugar a atitudes colaborativas e harmônicas, de respeito às instituições. E é isso a marca do governo do PT e aliados.  No lugar de um governo negacionista, elitista e autoritário, como era o anterior, temos hoje um transparente, que dialoga com as necessidades do povo brasileiro.
A conduta republicana atual está evidente nas ações  do Governo Federal para a reconstrução do Rio Grande do Sul depois da  catástrofe socioambiental. Com sensibilidade, sem negacionismo, como ocorreu no governo militarista passado diante da tragédia da pandemia. O Executivo Federal está presente na gigantesca tarefa de apoio à população e à recuperação da economia gaúchas, em parceria com o governo estadual e as prefeituras gaúchas. O momento é de união nacional para ajudar o Rio Grande do Sul.
A ação colaborativa do governo federal com estados e municípios, respeitando as respectivas autonomias, é de interesse de todo o País.
O PT já pôde mostrar ao povo brasileiro que é possível levar o Brasil a outro patamar civilizatório e de desenvolvimento. As perspectivas de futuro são muito melhores do que tínhamos até muito pouco tempo atrás. Em menos de um ano e meio, conquistamos colossais avanços. Sementes foram plantadas, a colheita já começa a ser feita.
en_title: Odair Cunha: Lula government strategic partnership with prefectures drives improvement of quality of life in the country
en_content:
- PT leader in the Chamber, Odair Cunha (MG), highlighted on Friday (31) the importance of the performance of President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva to alleviate the fiscal situation of the prefectures. Among the measures are the maintenance of 8% of the pension levies on the payroll of the prefectures, new rules for financing debts and precatory and facilitating agreements for transfers of Union resources.
" The measures announced in the week that passed, on the 25th March of the Mayors, in Brasilia, are an extraordinary advance for the 5,565 Brazilian municipalities”, and show the “strong respect of the PT and the current government to the municipalities”, said the deputy, in an article published in the magazine
For Odair Cunha, “to overcome political differences, with the collective interest above all, can give way to collaborative and harmonic attitudes, of respect to institutions. And that is the brand of the PT government and allies. Instead of a denialist, elitist and authoritarian government, as was the previous one, we have today a transparent one, which dialogues with the needs of the Brazilian people. ”
“The lesson that is taken is that it is possible to advance towards the construction of a more just, sustainable and developed country with understanding. This is how we make politics with 'P' capital, seeking to establish frank and sincere dialogue around what is possible. ”
(*)
President Lula's performance to alleviate the fiscal situation of the country's prefectures showed once again the strong respect of the PT and the current government to the municipalities. The measures announced in the week that passed, on the 25th March of the Mayors, in Brasilia, are an extraordinary advance for the 5,565 Brazilian municipalities. Mainly, the maintenance of the 8% of the pension levies on the payroll of the prefectures is highlighted, new rules for financing debts and precatories and facilitating agreements for transfers of Union resources.
The presence of the president in the march means the resumption of political civility. With a democratic, republican and federal stance, he showed respect for differences, plurality, diversity. A gesture that encourages tolerance and places public and collective interest above any political and ideological difference, unlike the previous government.
The social security disoneration for Brazilian municipalities was the result of an understanding of the House of Representatives, the Senate, the Supreme Court and the Executive Branch. The construction of this consensus allowed the prefectures to gain breath to balance their accounts in post-pandemic, and at the same time paved the way for the federal government to make fiscal adjustment.
The lesson is that it is possible to advance towards the construction of a more just, sustainable and developed country with understanding. This is how we make politics with “P” capital, seeking to establish frank and sincere dialogue around what is possible.
The effort to strengthen the municipalities is one of the goals of the current government. People live in the municipalities, dialogue with the mayors and mayors, councilors and councilors. As Lula said, there is no rich country with poor municipality. It is in the city that people struggle for education, health, leisure, housing and employment. It is not possible to take national measures, with different public policies, without taking into account the municipalities.
It is crucial to have a clear understanding that federative dialogue is essential to drive actions that lead to the improvement of the quality of life of the Brazilian people. An example of advancement built from understanding is the approval of the revolutionary tax reform, in a process that involved all federative beings and society. Instead of a bureaucratic system, with a cipoal of rules that make it one of the most complex of the planet, we will have a new, modern, effective and simplified tax framework.
Overcoming political differences, with the collective interest above all, can give way to collaborative and harmonic attitudes, of respect to institutions. And that is the brand of the PT government and allies. Instead of a denialist, elitist and authoritarian government, as was the previous one, we have today a transparent one, which dialogues with the needs of the Brazilian people.
The current republican conduct is evident in the actions of the Federal Government for the reconstruction of Rio Grande do Sul after the socio-environmental catastrophe. With sensitivity, without denialism, as occurred in the militarist government passed before the tragedy of pandemic. The Federal Executive is present in the gigantic task of supporting the population and the recovery of the gaucho economy, in partnership with the state government and the gaucho Prefectures. The moment is of national union to help the Rio Grande do Sul.
The collaborative action of the federal government with states and municipalities, respecting their respective autonomy, is of interest throughout the country.
PT has already been able to show the Brazilian people that it is possible to take Brazil to another level of civilisation and development. The future prospects are much better than we had until very little time ago. In less than a year and a half, we won colossal advances. Seeds were planted, the harvest already begins to be made.
en_subtitle: Among the measures are the maintenance of the 8% of the pension rate on the payroll of the prefectures

title: Vendas de imóveis em São Paulo ultrapassam 100 mil unidades em 12 meses
subtitle: Programa Minha Casa, Minha Vida e a redução da taxa de juros têm impacto direto no resultado do setor
content:
O mercado imobiliário paulistano atingiu um marco histórico em março deste ano, ultrapassando pela primeira vez a venda de 100 mil imóveis no acumulado de 12 meses, informa o 
Entre as regiões que mais se destacam nesse cenário, a Mooca, bairro tradicional da capital, tem ganhado destaque. Conhecida por suas antigas fábricas, galpões e residências históricas, a Mooca está em plena transformação. O bairro, que já foi reduto de famílias abastadas, agora atrai a construção de prédios de alto padrão. De acordo com a pesquisa da Brain, a Mooca lidera as vendas na capital, com 3.540 apartamentos comercializados nos últimos 12 meses. Além disso, a Mooca foi o bairro que mais lançou novos apartamentos padrão e ficou em segundo lugar em lançamentos de imóveis pelo programa Minha Casa, Minha Vida, ficando atrás apenas do Jardim São Luís, na Zona Sul.
Em toda a cidade, somente em março de 2024, foram lançados 21 empreendimentos residenciais, totalizando 6.056 unidades no mercado. As vendas líquidas atingiram 8.154 unidades no mesmo mês. Especialistas indicam que, se não houvesse novos lançamentos, o estoque atual seria esgotado em menos de um ano, evidenciando a alta demanda.
Renan Pieri, economista e professor da Fundação Getúlio Vargas, atribui parte do crescimento do mercado à redução das taxas de juros. “A redução das taxas de juros pode impulsionar o mercado imobiliário, pois torna o crédito mais acessível e barato, diminuindo o custo das parcelas de empréstimos e facilitando a aquisição de imóveis dentro do orçamento familiar. Além disso, há alternativas como consórcios e negociações diretas, ampliando as opções disponíveis”.
en_title: Property sales in São Paulo exceed 100,000 units in 12 months
en_content:
The São Paulo real estate market reached a historic landmark in March this year, surpassing for the first time the sale of 100,000 properties in the accumulated 12 months, says the
Among the regions that most stand out in this scenario, Mooca, the traditional district of the capital, has gained highlight. Known for its old factories, sheds and historic residences, Mooca is in full transformation. The neighborhood, which has already been reductive of wealthy families, now attracts the construction of high standard buildings. According to Brain's research, Mooca leads sales in the capital, with 3.540 apartments sold in the last 12 months.
